privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task with 40 hardcoded houseplant propagation records spanning approximately 3.5 months (March-June 2023, not the 8 months claimed in README). The data includes 7 real houseplant types (Pothos, Monstera, String of Pearls, Philodendron, Snake Plant, ZZ Plant, Spider Plant) and 5 propagation methods (water, soil, perlite, LECA, sphagnum). Data includes intentional inconsistencies: mixed date formats ('March 15', '3/18/23', 'mid-March', '2023-03-20') and informal outcomes ('roots!', 'rotted', 'success', 'rooted', 'still waiting'). Overall success rate is 72.5% (29/40). The task requires 8 verification criteria with a 75% threshold (6/8 required): date standardization, success determination, duration calculation, success rates by method (5 methods present, 3+ required) and plant type (7 types present, 5+ required), average rooting time, conditional formatting, and summary table creation. Difficulty is medium due to required skills: DATEVALUE/DATE functions, text parsing (SEARCH/FIND), IF/AND/OR logic, statistical functions (COUNTIF, COUNTIFS, AVERAGEIF, AVERAGE), DAYS function, and conditional formatting.
